programme.title: Murder in the Dark
programme.desc: When a blind waitress witnesses a murder, she too becomes a target.

programme.title: Somebody's Watching Me
programme.desc: A woman searches for answers when she receives a flash drive with disturbing footage of a masked stranger who's watching her while she sleeps.

programme.title: Kidnapped in Her Own Home: The Martha Carelli Story
programme.desc: Martha Carelli's quiet life is shattered when an escaped convict hiding in her basement takes her hostage. Forced to drive his getaway car, she finds herself trapped in a dangerous psychological battle where survival depends on courage and cunning.

programme.title: Somebody's Watching Me
programme.desc: A woman searches for answers when she receives a flash drive with disturbing footage of a masked stranger who's watching her while she sleeps.

programme.title: Kidnapped in Her Own Home: The Martha Carelli Story
programme.desc: Martha Carelli's quiet life is shattered when an escaped convict hiding in her basement takes her hostage. Forced to drive his getaway car, she finds herself trapped in a dangerous psychological battle where survival depends on courage and cunning.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; based on the belief that the Bible is the written and inspired Word of God, the show is meant to invoke change in the lives of people across the globe; Creflo and his wife, Taffi, share their vision for everyone to hear the Word and gain understanding of God's love and promises.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: James Robison is a former preacher who changed directions in his life several years ago and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people. This daily religious and self-help program welcomes guests who tell how they have successfully overcome difficulties in their lives by following God's word -- with the hope of encouraging others to do the same and look to God for help and guidance in times of need. The Robisons provide viewers with Bible-based advice to help them deal with everyday problems.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Noted for her humanitarian ministry efforts to aid suffering people around the world, Bible teacher Joyce Meyer reaches out to both Christians and non-Christians as she illustrates how to make each day better by applying biblical principles to every activity.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: McCall's vigilante work further complicates her personal life when she is forced to ask her ex-husband, Dr. Miles Fulton, to help with a gunshot victim, one of two women being hunted by thieves after they witnessed a robbery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: When Aunt Vi is the lone juror on a murder trial who believes the defendant is innocent, McCall covertly investigates the case to find proof that Vi's instincts are correct.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed psychic claims his missing sister is in imminent danger, according to his visions; Delilah struggles under the weight of keeping McCall's secrets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: After a mafia-related mass casualty, the team is tasked to keep the peace at the hospital; Lucy and Celina work together to investigate the suspects behind the attack; Tim and Aaron embark on a metro ops mission.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officer Nolan and Celina take on a special case; Monica enlists help to identify her attackers; Lopez and Harper discover a connection to the trail of crimes.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Sgt. Grey helps the team prepare for their biggest mission yet; Aaron, Lopez, Celina, Tim and Smitty discover a surprising connection in their case.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett search for a stolen antique that may have been Aladdin's lamp in the hope it will lead them to a smuggler's murderer.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When Hayley finds herself being implicated in a cyber-terror attack after doing an old friend a favor, Castle and Beckett rush to clear her name.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Tierra is a musician with massive bumps on her ears that hold her back from performing.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: "Dottie the Body" lost her confidence when a large bump started growing between her thighs; Dr. Lee brings in a new, young doctor to help Tim with his big, bumpy nose; Karime is insecure about her birthmark that looks like a black eye.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Allie's lifestyle is ruined by the gumball-sized bump above her eye; Andrew's psoriasis and multiple body bumps have held him back from starting a family; Dr. Lyndsey assists Dr. Lee with Cristina's concerning shoulder lipoma.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Angela has a big, melon-sized growth on the back of her neck that she fears can ruin her daughter's wedding; Loretta is terrified that her painful can get in the way of making her movie.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: John is a sweet guy trying to get over his bumpy past; Tami has yellow deposits on her eyelids that make it impossible for her to feel beautiful; Dr. Farhang helps Dr. Lee with a terrified patient, Lili, who has a lump on the back of her arm.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dave has 17 huge, painful head bumps; Melissa recently moved to a new town but her mysterious red, scaly lesions cover her legs; Glamorous dermatologist Dr. Shearer Seymour shadows Dr. Lee as they attempt to remove a pointy cyst from Sam's cheek.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dave is a firefighter and avid cyclist whose bump gets in the way of wearing various helmets; Bree empowers others on social media by accepting her own psoriasis, but it has recently become too painful to endure.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dee has the voice of an angel, but her huge neck hump has stolen her passion to sing; Eli wants to be a chef, but feels ashamed of his cheek bump; Dr. Zoe assists Dr. Lee to remove Showta's many boba-shaped bumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: John is a sweet guy trying to get over his bumpy past; Tami has yellow deposits on her eyelids that make it impossible for her to feel beautiful; Dr. Farhang helps Dr. Lee with a terrified patient, Lili, who has a lump on the back of her arm.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dave has 17 huge, painful head bumps; Melissa recently moved to a new town but her mysterious red, scaly lesions cover her legs; Glamorous dermatologist Dr. Shearer Seymour shadows Dr. Lee as they attempt to remove a pointy cyst from Sam's cheek.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dave is a firefighter and avid cyclist whose bump gets in the way of wearing various helmets; Bree empowers others on social media by accepting her own psoriasis, but it has recently become too painful to endure.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dee has the voice of an angel, but her huge neck hump has stolen her passion to sing; Eli wants to be a chef, but feels ashamed of his cheek bump; Dr. Zoe assists Dr. Lee to remove Showta's many boba-shaped bumps.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. programme.title: Creflo Dollar

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison

This daily religious and self-help program welcomes guests who tell how they have successfully overcome difficulties in their lives by following God's word -- with the hope of encouraging others to do the same and look to God for help and guidance in times of need. programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: McCall's determination to apprehend Mason Quinn, the criminal responsible for Bishop's death, veers into a dangerous obsession that could cost her everything; Delilah finally meets her mother's vigilante team.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: In the aftermath of her abduction, the walls between McCall's family and vigilante life continue to crumble as those closest to her must come together for the first time to save her.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: The team helps an FDNY firefighter's daughter when her father suddenly goes missing; Aunt Vi and Delilah continue to cope after McCall's abduction.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: John and the team welcome two new rookies and continue the hunt for two dangerous inmates with very personal vendettas following their prison escape.

programme.desc: When a movie star turned stage actor is mysteriously killed, Castle and Beckett go backstage and discover he had more than his lines to worry about.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Mystery novelist Richard Castle works with New York police to find a killer who is modeling his crimes after scenes from Castle's novels.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A woman's body is stashed in a laundry-room dryer in an upscale apartment building where she was a nanny; Castle tries to get inside Beckett's head while writing the first novel in his Nikki Heat series.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett uncover a story of betrayal and obsession when they investigate the death of a teenage boy.

programme.desc: When a strange murder scene points to a ritualistic killing, Castle and Beckett search for the killer.
